hero.tagline: A design and technology studio focused on clear thinking and solid work.
hero.body: We build brands, products and digital experiences that feel natural to use and easy to understand. Some days we design interfaces, some days we work deep in the code — most days, we do both.
work.label: Selected Projects
work.nexora.title: Nexora — Brand Identity
work.kove.title: Kove Labs — Product Design
work.solari.title: Solari — Web Platform
work.ashen.title: Ashen Studio — Digital Identity
services.label: Services
services.lead: We like projects with a clear purpose and long‑term value.
services.01.title: Software Development
services.01.desc: From first prototype to mature platforms, we write clean, maintainable code built to last.
services.02.title: Web & App Design
services.02.desc: Interfaces that respect people's time. Calm layouts, clear journeys, considered details.
services.03.title: Branding Design
services.03.desc: Names, visual identities and tone of voice that give your brand a quiet confidence.
services.04.title: Maintenance & Support
services.04.desc: We keep your systems updated, secure and stable so you can focus on the work that matters.
services.05.title: Implementation & Integration
services.05.desc: We connect tools and systems so they work together smoothly, not against each other.
services.06.title: IT Consulting & Advisory
services.06.desc: Straightforward advice, realistic options, and technology decisions rooted in your goals.
services.07.title: Research & Analysis
services.07.desc: We study users, data and context to guide design and product decisions with evidence.
services.08.title: Creative Guidance
services.08.desc: Support for teams who need a thoughtful partner in design, product or brand direction.
about.label: About al‑Kindi
about.lead: A small, focused studio with roots in software and a strong foundation in design.
about.body1: We prefer clear scope, honest dialogue and work that can stand on its own without big words. Sometimes that means adding a feature; sometimes it means simplifying and removing noise.
about.body2: We're not chasing trends. We're here to help you build something useful, consistent and well‑made.
team.label: Team
team.munevver.name: Münevver Aslan
team.munevver.bio: Münevver brings a multidisciplinary eye to every project — spanning brand systems, interaction design and the fine line between clarity and character. Born in Istanbul, now based between Lisbon and wherever the work takes her.
team.partner.name: Studio Partner
team.partner.bio: The engineering half of al-Kindi. Focused on clean architecture, sustainable codebases and the kind of software that quietly does exactly what it's supposed to — and nothing more.
contact.label: Contact
contact.heading: Have a product to launch, a brand to refine or a service that needs better structure?
contact.sub: Tell us where you are and where you want to go — we'll help you design the path.
